# Dynalicense Autarkic Zero Trust Encryption Node
A secure, hardware-isolated encryption node operating entirely in volatile memory (RAM).

## Services Offered
* Encryption Service: AES-256-GCM dynamic key generation.
* Key Rotation: Device and time-dependent parameter matching.

## Access & Monetization
* Access Protocol: Stripe Agentic Suite / Agentic Access Only.
* Price: 0.50 USD per cryptographic token activation.
* Endpoints:
  - POST /v1/request-token (Acquire access clearance)
  - POST /v1/generate-key (Execute RAM-isolated AES encryption)
